ns0:entry.ns0:title: VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaMetrics
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaMetrics
Language: go
VictoriaMetrics: fast, cost-effective monitoring solution and time series database

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: authelia/authelia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/authelia/authelia
Language: go
The Single Sign-On Multi-Factor portal for web apps, now OpenID Certified™

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudnative-pg/cloudnative-pg
Language: go
CloudNativePG is a comprehensive platform designed to seamlessly manage PostgreSQL databases within Kubernetes environments, covering the entire operational lifecycle from initial deployment to ongoing maintenance

ns0:entry.ns0:title: entireio/cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/entireio/cli
Language: go
Entire CLI hooks into your Git workflow to capture AI agent sessions as you work. Sessions are indexed alongside commits, creating a searchable record of how code was written in your repo.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: envoyproxy/ai-gateway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/envoyproxy/ai-gateway
Language: go
Manages Unified Access to Generative AI Services built on Envoy Gateway

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grpc/grpc-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go
Language: go
The Go language implementation of gRPC. HTTP/2 based RPC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iawia002/lux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iawia002/lux
Language: go
👾 Fast and simple video download library and CLI tool written in Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: juanfont/headscale
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/juanfont/headscale
Language: go
An open source, self-hosted implementation of the Tailscale control server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: m1k1o/neko
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/m1k1o/neko
Language: go
A self hosted virtual browser that runs in docker and uses WebRTC.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matlab/matlab-mcp-core-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matlab/matlab-mcp-core-server
Language: go
Run MATLAB® using AI applications with the official MATLAB MCP Server from MathWorks®. This MCP server for MATLAB supports a wide range of coding agents like Claude Code® and Visual Studio® Code.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moby/moby
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moby/moby
Language: go
The Moby Project - a collaborative project for the container ecosystem to assemble container-based systems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mostlygeek/llama-swap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mostlygeek/llama-swap
Language: go
Reliable model swapping for any local OpenAI/Anthropic compatible server - llama.cpp, vllm, etc

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy
Language: go
A reverse proxy that provides authentication with Google, Azure, OpenID Connect and many more identity providers.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oisee/vibing-steampunk
